subject: A centaur shaman standing in a forest clearing, holding a staff or bow-like implement, surrounded by drifting purple petals or magical motes
description: A centaur figure stands in profile within a sun-dappled forest, body angled to the right with the human torso turning slightly toward the viewer. The centaur's lower equine body is dark, and the upper body wears earth-toned wraps or leather. Tall slender trees rise in the background with shafts of light filtering through the canopy. Soft violet petals or glowing motes drift through the air around the figure, lending a hushed, sacred-grove atmosphere. The palette is dominated by forest greens, warm browns, and accents of pale violet.
foreground: centaur shaman with staff, drifting petals
background: sunlit forest grove with tall slender trees and filtered light
